description: Draft or record of legal deed(s) in a court notebook. Concerning the dissolution of a partnership at the death of one of the partners. Names: Khiyār (the one who died); Yehuda b. Shemuel; Yona b. Yiṣḥaq; Yefet b. Shelomo Ibn al-Sukkarī; Moshe.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
